mapper.select: SELECT id, code, name, description, status FROM role ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO role (code, name, description, status) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{description}, #{status})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM role_permission WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND permission_id = #{permissionId}
mapper.select: SELECT p.code FROM permission p INNER JOIN role_permission rp ON p.id = rp.permission_id WHERE rp.role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO permission (code, name, module, create_time) VALUES (#{code}, #{name}, #{module}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, code, name, module, create_time FROM permission ORDER BY id
